name: Aya 101
note: 13B mT5-based instruction model covering 101 languages, built by 3,000+ researchers; Apache-2.0, no hosted inference provider.

results.notes: 0-shot XWinograd (coreference resolution, 6 languages), Table 8 of the Aya paper, for the translation-heavy Aya variant that is the final released model (hf.co/CohereLabs/aya-101).

Table 6 of the Aya model paper (arXiv:2402.07827): multilingual MMLU (M-MMLU, machine-translated to 31 languages per Dac Lai et al. 2023), 5-shot, for the Aya (translation-heavy) variant, which the paper marks as the final released Aya model corresponding to the shipped hf.co/CohereLabs/aya-101 checkpoint. Same mapping convention already used elsewhere in this corpus (e.g. Aya 23 35B's multilingual-MMLU-as-mmlu entry).

verificationNotes: Confirmed genuine via arXiv:2402.07827 (submitted 2024-02-12, matches releaseDate) and HF CohereLabs/aya-101 model card. 13B mT5-based, 101 languages, Apache-2.0, ~1024-token (1K) context per mT5 pretraining/finetuning setup — all match input record. No results claimed, none added.
